---
title: "Pulsar analysis"
author: "Gabriel Sanábio Mazzetti Affonso"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme:
      light: journal
      dark: darkly
    theme-toggle: true
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Exibir Código"
    header-includes: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.1/font/bootstrap-icons.css">
      <style>
        /* Cria o espaço e o ícone após o sumário */
        #TOC::after {
          content: "\F3ED"; /* Código do ícone GitHub no Bootstrap Icons */
          font-family: "bootstrap-icons";
          display: block;
          text-align: center;
          font-size: 2rem;
          margin-top: 20px;
          padding-top: 10px;
          border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6;
          cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        /* Torna o ícone clicável */
        #TOC {
          position: relative;
        }
        
        #TOC .github-link {
          position: absolute;
          bottom: -50px;
          left: 50%;
          transform: translateX(-50%);
          text-decoration: none;
          color: inherit;
          font-size: 0.8rem;
          text-align: center;
          width: 100%;
        }
      </style>
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
          var toc = document.querySelector('#TOC');
          if (toc) {
            var a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = "https://github.com/GabrielMazzetti";
            a.target = "_blank";
            a.className = "github-link";
            toc.appendChild(a);
            
            // Faz o ícone (gerado pelo CSS ::after) ser clicável
            toc.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
              if (e.offsetY > toc.offsetHeight - 50) {
                window.open("https://github.com/GabrielMazzetti", "_blank");
              }
            });
          }
        });
        </script>
        
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---
